panels.empty: Click + above to create a panel

table.label: Table
table.desc: Editable spreadsheet for schedules and datasets

web.label: Web
web.desc: Embedded browser for internal pages and tools

rag.label: Knowledge
rag.desc: Local document retrieval, citations and knowledge graph

thread.welcome: How can I help you today?

web.empty: Enter a URL and the page will be embedded here
web.requiresDesktopOpen: Opening internal web pages requires the desktop app (Tauri). The browser-only dev mode cannot dock a webview; please use npm run dev:desktop.
web.requiresDesktopRead: Reading page content requires the desktop app (Tauri); for public URLs use the web_fetch tool instead.

models.title: Models
models.emptyUnconfigured: No models available yet. Configure a provider below.
models.confirmDeleteModel: Delete “{{name}}”? This clears the saved provider configuration.
models.modelNameHint: The model parameter for OpenAI-compatible APIs. Usually no change needed.
models.apiKeyHint: Required. The key is never shown again after saving.
models.saveSuccessNoModels: Save failed: invalid configuration. Check your API key, model name, and request URL.
models.saveFailed: Failed to save. Please try again.

skillsPage.title: Skills
skillsPage.description: Enable bundled skills or create custom knowledge blocks that agents can activate during conversations.
skillsPage.editorDescription: Skills provide specialized knowledge the agent can load when relevant.
skillsPage.descriptionHint: Short summary shown in the skills list.
skillsPage.contentHint: Markdown body injected when the skill is activated.

rulesPage.title: Rules
rulesPage.description: Custom instructions injected into the system prompt — always, or when keywords appear in the user message.
rulesPage.editorDescription: Rules are prepended to the system prompt when their trigger matches.
rulesPage.contentHint: Instruction text injected into the system prompt.
rulesPage.contentPlaceholder: Always verify schedule conflicts before proposing changes…
rulesPage.keywordsHint: Comma-separated; rule applies when any keyword appears in the user message.

mcpPage.title: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
mcpPage.description: Add Model Context Protocol servers to expand what your agent can do. Toggle installed servers on or off without uninstalling.
mcpPage.editorDescription: Connect a remote MCP server over SSE or HTTP.
mcpPage.transportHint: SSE for streaming endpoints; HTTP for streamable HTTP MCP.
mcpPage.noInstalledMatch: No installed servers match your search.

library.github: Review PRs, triage issues, and post summaries from repository events.
library.slack: Send automation digests and alerts to channels your team already uses.
library.linear: Sync issue status and create follow-up tasks from agent workflows.
library.notion: Publish reports and structured notes to shared team workspaces.
library.tavily: Web search and research for agents that need fresh external context.
library.supabase: Query project data and run operational checks against your database.

automate.title: Automations
automate.description: View active and inactive automations, search by metadata, and inspect read-only details.
automate.editorDescription: Run an agent prompt on a schedule or in response to an event.
automate.triggerFilterHint: Optional JSON; matched against the event payload, e.g. {"event":"github.push"}
automate.promptHint: The instruction the agent runs each time.
automate.promptPlaceholder: Summarize open pull requests and flag blockers…
automate.openRunFailed: Unable to open this run yet. Try again after it appears in the sidebar.
automate.triggerFilterJsonError: Trigger filter must be valid JSON
automate.enableToRun: Enable the automation to run it

prTriage.name: PR triage digest
prTriage.description: Summarize open pull requests and flag items that need attention.
prTriage.prompt: Review open pull requests from the last 24 hours. Summarize risk, reviewers, and blockers. Post a concise digest.

securityPass.name: Nightly security pass
securityPass.description: Scan dependencies and surface CVEs before the next standup.
securityPass.prompt: Run a security review of dependencies changed in the last day. List CVEs, severity, and recommended actions.

slackDigest.name: Slack standup digest
slackDigest.description: Compile engineering updates and post them to your team channel.
slackDigest.prompt: Prepare a weekday standup digest from recent repo activity and open tasks. Format for Slack.

incidentHook.name: Incident webhook summary
incidentHook.description: React to incident webhooks and produce an actionable summary.
incidentHook.prompt: When an incident webhook fires, summarize impact, affected services, and recommended next steps.

extract.noTextPdf: {{name}}: no text extracted (possibly a scanned/image PDF)
extract.unsupported: .{{ext}} format is not supported yet; please convert to txt / md / pdf / docx / xlsx and upload again

reconnect.offlineBody: Waiting for the network to come back…

rateLimited.title: Rate limited
rateLimited.detail: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.

serverError.title: Server error
serverError.detail: The server ran into a problem. Please try again later.

serviceBusy.title: Service busy
serviceBusy.detail: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please retry shortly.

gatewayTimeout.title: Gateway timeout
gatewayTimeout.detail: The request took too long. Please try again.

livenessTimeout.title: Connection timed out
livenessTimeout.detail: No response from the server. Please check your network and retry.

reconnectFailed.title: Reconnect failed
reconnectFailed.detail: Could not restore the connection. Please retry.

chatError.reconnectExhausted: Reconnect time budget exhausted (10 minutes). Please try again later.

network.title: Network issue
network.detail: A network problem occurred. Please check your connection.

unauthorized.title: Unauthorized
unauthorized.detail: Your session is invalid or has expired. Please sign in again.

modelNotConfigured.title: Model not configured
modelNotConfigured.detail: Open Settings -> Models and add your own API key before chatting.

unknown.detail: Something went wrong. Please try again.

sched.confirmDeleteSheet: Delete this sheet? This cannot be undone.
sched.confirmImport: Importing will replace current data. Continue?

rag.confirmDelete: Delete "{{filename}}"? Related chunks and graph data will be removed.
rag.enterQuery: Please enter a question or keyword to search
rag.title: Knowledge Base
rag.subtitle: Local document retrieval, citation tracking and knowledge graph
rag.searchPlaceholder: Search the knowledge base, e.g. which orders are at risk of delay?
rag.searchEmptyDesc: After uploading documents, enter a question above; search combines full-text and semantic similarity.
rag.graphEmptyDesc: Entities and relations are extracted automatically after uploading documents, forming a browsable knowledge graph.
rag.citationsEmptyDesc: Recent references appear here after the agent calls knowledge_search or you search above.
rag.docsEmptyDesc: Click upload at the top right to add TXT, Markdown, CSV, JSON, log and other text files; they will be chunked, embedded and graphed automatically.

wf.backendUnavailable: Backend unavailable ({{status}}). Please ensure the server is running on :8787
wf.nameExists: A flow named "{{name}}" already exists. Please use a different name.
wf.confirmDelete: Delete the flow "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
wf.label: Label

form.startHint: Entry node. The payload from manual/scheduled/event triggers can be referenced via {{ref}}.
form.branchHint: Green handle = true branch, red = false branch.
form.endHint: Leave empty to output all node results.
form.codeHint: JS runs in a sandbox; read variables below via inputs.xxx and return an object.
form.headers: Headers (one Key: value per line, or JSON)
